rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to the owning component and use only visible identifiers from the AADL model.
Assumptions and guarantees must be expressed using the syntax: assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression;.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Constants and equations are declared using const name : type = value; and eq name : type = expression;.
Assignments are used for implementation-level bindings within component implementations.
All identifiers in AGREE expressions must be declared or visible in the current component scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact AADL component, port, and data names as they appear in the model.
Ensure that assume/guarantee expressions are syntactically valid and reference only visible symbols.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed in the model.
Avoid copying identifiers from examples or inventing new ports/components not present in the AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their mapping to AGREE variables
Model fusion and component merging rules
